description: License compliance policy for the Nebutra-Sailor monorepo (AGPL-3.0).

forbidden.reason: GPL-2.0-only is incompatible with AGPL-3.0 (no 'or later' upgrade path)
GPL-3.0 combined work would restrict AGPL-3.0 network-use provisions
Server Side Public License is not OSI-approved and imposes service-level copyleft obligations
European Union Public License has complex compatibility matrix and reciprocal obligations
European Union Public License has complex compatibility matrix and reciprocal obligations
AGPL-1.0 is an older, incompatible version of the Affero GPL

notes: Our own @nebutra/* packages are AGPL-3.0 and excluded from the check. The CI job and local script both use license-checker-rspack via npx (not installed as a dependency).
